title: Subjunctive after doubt chunks
subtitle: Say I do not think / I doubt.
overview: No creo que often triggers subjunctive.
Use these chunks to sound natural.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I do not think it is easy.
I do not think it works like that.

items.es: No creo que sea una buena idea salir tan tarde.
items.en: I do not think it is a good idea to leave so late.

items.es: Dudo que el restaurante esté abierto ahora.
items.en: I doubt the restaurant is open now.

items.es: No creo que Ana pueda venir hoy.
items.en: I do not think Ana can come today.

items.es: Dudo que haya billetes para mañana.
items.en: I doubt there are tickets for tomorrow.

items.es: No pienso que esta solución funcione a largo plazo.
items.en: I do not think this solution works in the long term.
